display_text: Lycan Aghanim's Scepter: Wolf Bite — Grants Shapeshift properties to an ally, creating a symbiotic lifesteal bond. This upgrade counters burst damage and sustain wars by providing shared 40% Lifesteal, turning Lycan into a force multiplier for his team's frontline.
search_text: Lycan Aghanim Scepter Wolf Bite lifesteal sustain anti-burst force multiplier

display_text: Lycan Aghanim's Shard: Summon Wolves — Enhances creep waves with uncontrollable wolves that pressure lanes and cripple towers. This upgrade counters passive defense strategies by applying constant structural pressure, transforming Lycan into an unstoppable split-pusher.
search_text: Lycan Aghanim Shard Summon Wolves split-push tower pressure lane sustain
